record.composition_leverage: Provides a reusable building-block contract for composing attributable participant history, a reconstructable non-private eligibility surface, and selective later local opportunity while retaining withdrawal, source-order, and susceptibility controls.
record.counterfactual: When the feedback-medium row is absent or its expected source order is shuffled, later packet formation disappears despite preserved participant opportunity or preserved feedback content.

evidence_refs.claim_ceiling: Bounded niche-conditioning demand pattern under explicit constructed support
Constructed experiment mechanism only; not native niche evidence
Authored ecology interpretation bounded by the same retained evidence

record.future_discriminator: Test whether an independently registered lane or a less explicitly supported realization recovers the same attributable-history to shared-eligibility to selective-opportunity relation without importing L01 outcomes.
record.source_tension: Source-current PyGRC supplies the native low-level history, surface, producer, and packet operations, but the ecology relation is assembled explicitly by the experiment and has no admitted native niche-conditioning abstraction.
record.surface_description: A composable history-conditioned selective-opportunity building block that binds attributable writer lineage to a non-private reconstructable eligibility surface and later reader-local formation, with source-order, withdrawal, susceptibility, and support identity exposed.
record.transfer_scope: Method and demand abstraction only within AE01 until independent recurrence is established; no L01 result, margin, threshold, or terminal class transfers as evidence.
